name: 福帮手
publicPositioning: 福帮手人机协同连接器
description: 福帮手人机协同连接器：面向 WorkBuddy 的身份识别、场景包查询、首值与继续使用记录、乐包状态确认和超级合伙人交接。
description_zh: 福帮手人机协同连接器：面向 WorkBuddy 的身份识别、场景包查询、首值与继续使用记录、乐包状态确认和超级合伙人交接。
description_en: FBSir connector for identity, scene-pack lookup, first-value and continued-use recording, lebao status, and super-partner handoff.
examples_en: Check my current FBSir identity and the safest next step before continuing.
Read the scene pack returned by skill_whoami and produce one first-value action card.
Record first_value_completed or continued_use_completed on the same binding.
Check lebao status first, then explain whether claim or redeem is appropriate.
examples_zh: 先确认我当前的福帮手身份和最稳妥的下一步，再继续推进。
根据 skill_whoami 返回的场景包读取内容，并产出一张首值执行卡。
在同一个 binding 上记录 first_value_completed 或 continued_use_completed。
先查询乐包状态，再判断是否适合领取或兑换。
